title: espg-lunar-potential-map

creators.name: Kim, Hyun Jung
creators.affiliation: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology

description: Research/provenance code used to generate derived Lunar Prospector Electron Reflectometer spacecraft-relative lunar surface potential products for the manuscript "Identifiability and Sampling Limits on Spacecraft-Relative Lunar Surface Potential from Lunar Prospector Electron Reflectometer Observations." This repository is provided as provenance code rather than as a polished manuscript reproduction package.
